name: tip-protocol
description: TIP Protocol — Trust Identity Protocol. Open, federated, post-quantum identity verification, content provenance, and deterministic trust scoring.
author: Dinesh Mendhe <chairman@theailab.org> (https://theailab.org)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd python && pip install -r requirements.txt --break-system-packages
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:python
scripts.seed:fresh: rm -rf data genesis-data/backups genesis-data/temp-users && rm -f genesis-data/*-keys.json genesis-data/genesis.json genesis-data/seed-output.json genesis-data/*.db genesis-data/*.db-* && node --experimental-vm-modules scripts/seed.js
scripts.seed:fresh:local: rm -rf data genesis-data/backups genesis-data/temp-users node2-env node3-env && rm -f genesis-data/*-keys.json genesis-data/genesis.json genesis-data/seed-output.json genesis-data/*.db genesis-data/*.db-* && node --experimental-vm-modules scripts/seed.js --local-cluster

publisher: The AI Lab Intelligence Unobscured, Inc.

contributors.name: The AI Lab Intelligence Unobscured, Inc.
